name: Lyria
desc: Although she remembers nothing before the Erste Empire took her, this preternaturally powerful girl harbors the potential to alter the fate of the sky. Her demonstrated capabilities include commanding primal beasts and linking her life force to the life force of another.

name: Vyrn
desc: This small dragon has been by your side since you were little. No one knows exactly what he is, not even Vyrn himself. He loves apples and hates being called a lizard.

name: Orchis
title: Queen of Erste Kingdom
desc: The former princess of Erste Kingdom. Orchis is a childhood friend of the Black Knight Apollonia as well as the model for Orchid's new vessel. With the reestablishment of Erste Kingdom, she ascended the throne to rule alongside her advisor, Adam. Although she is the same age as Apollonia, her previous ordeal as a spirit left both her body and mentality in a youthful state.

name: Farhana
desc: Belongs to an ancient type of people that lived during the time of the creation myth. Wife of the hero Abramelin, Farhana was a skilled swordswoman who was also efficient with the single-handed gun and had become a legend as an explorer. She raised Fenie—a fragment of the Phoenix—together with her husband and lived happily with them until the family found themselves pulled into the war against god. Realizing that she was the reason Abramelin refused to drink the blood of the Phoenix, Farhana decided to give up her own life during the battle, looking forward to a promised reincarnation and reuniting with Abramelin in 6,000 years. Though Farhana was a brave and clever fighter, she was also reckless. In accordance with the Phoenix's prediction, she was reincarnated into the present time as Sabrina in the Kingdom of Radlith.

name: Gallanth
desc: A legendary skyfarer who traveled the skies as a disciple of the god of destruction before ultimately arriving in Estalucia. The biological father of the main character, he inspired his child's journey with a letter stating he would be waiting on the Island of the Astrals. While his exact origins are unclear, he was raised like family alongside his future wife Rein and mastered unarmed combat under the tutelage of an elderly woman in their hometown. Gallanth has ties to both Vyrn, who was entrusted to him and Rein, and Lyria, whom he discovered in the Ecksegrande Skydom, but he is not a singularity. Though many wild tales remain of his battles with primal beasts, his temperament has mellowed following his two journeys and the birth of his child.

name: Rel Estalucia
desc: The Speaker and attendant of the Omnipotent's clone in Estalucia, they are tasked with the realm's management and maintenance. While granted immense authority within Estalucia, they were created solely for its upkeep and is unable to leave its confines. During the time when the afterlife was distorted by the Otherworld's influence, their workload was light. However, with the disappearance of the Omnipotent's clone and the collapse of the Otherworld, their duties have surged, leaving them somewhat flustered. Deep down, they secretly dream of one day visiting the oceans of the Sky Realm, but no one understands better than them that such a wish can never be fulfilled.

name: Onoskelis
desc: An Astral who once oversaw the Oarlyegrande Skydom. Thrust into the position through a series of unlikely turns, she failed to conquer the Istavion Kingdom during the invasion, leaving her authority in name only. Possessing the pride of an Astral without the ability to match it, she craves recognition from others. She and Lilit had known each other before coming to the Sky Realm, theirs being the one relationship she could consider a friendship.

name: Astaroth
desc: An Astral of the High Council, feared as the Demon King and served by the origin beast Magus. He once plotted to seize control of the Astral Realm but was purged by the supreme primarch Lucifer, and his remains are now enshrined by Magus's hand. His ambitions reached beyond the sky and stars—even the moon and sun—to a still vaster world.
